attacking_style: Lacks the explosive power for decisive late-race attacks; tends to lead into finales but fades in the final steep gradient kicks or sustained high-intensity efforts.
team_tactics: Teams have deployed him in frontline pacing roles, but poor calibration of effort distribution leaves him depleted for critical final phases of climbs or breakaways.
terrain_preference: Struggles on variable gradient punchy climbs and sustained breakaway scenarios requiring repeated high-intensity efforts; no clear terrain strength evident from observations.
vulnerability: Exposed when racing requires sustained horsepower in breakaways or explosive finishing power on steep gradient kicks in final 100-200m.
key_patterns: Fades badly in final phases after leading/pacing earlier, indicating poor power reserve management (2 instances)
Dropped from breakaways before critical climbs despite team support, lacking sustained racing power (2 instances)
Teams misjudge his pacing capabilities on variable/steep gradients leading to premature depletion (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: Consistent pattern of lacking horsepower across 2019-2022 observations, unable to sustain breakaway or finale efforts
